name: Garlic Soup 2
recipeIngredient: 1 large Ripe tomato, peeled, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat half the oil in a frying pan with chopped garlic. Add bread crumbs and cook, stirring, for 5 minutes.
2. In a large saucepan or soup kettle heat remaining 1/4 cup of oil. Add zucchini, red pepper, tomato, eggplant, and onion. Cook until tender, then stir in the bread mixture. (The bread will break down as the soup cooks and acts as a thickener.)
3. Stir in paprika and garlic powder followed by chicken broth. Simmer for 30 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Stir in artichoke hearts and parsley. Season with salt and pepper. Serve immediately in heated bowls.
5. Garnish with toasted almonds. Makes 11 cups.
